workAuthorization: I am authorized to work in the United States on an H-1B visa. Sponsorship may be required in the future.
requireSponsorship: Yes, I may require sponsorship in the future for H-1B renewal or green card.
relocation: Yes, I am open to relocating within the United States.
salaryExpectation: $120,000 - $160,000 depending on role, location, and total compensation package.
whyInterested: I am excited about this opportunity because it aligns with my expertise in building scalable cloud-native systems and my passion for engineering high-quality, maintainable software solutions.
strengths: Strong problem-solving skills, deep expertise in cloud-native architectures and Java/Python microservices, experience leading CI/CD modernization, and a track record of delivering complex distributed systems.
weakness: I sometimes spend extra time perfecting solutions, but I have learned to balance thoroughness with delivery timelines through agile practices.
startDate: Within 2-3 weeks of receiving an offer
remoteHybrid: I am open to remote, hybrid, or on-site work arrangements.
coverLetter: I am a Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience building distributed, cloud-native platforms across AWS, Azure, and GCP. I specialize in Java/Python microservices, Kubernetes orchestration, CI/CD automation, and Angular frontends. I thrive in collaborative agile teams and am passionate about delivering scalable, reliable, and maintainable software.
additionalInfo: Available for interviews at any time. References available upon request.
